error.default: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later.

required.registerPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters long and include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one digit, and at least one of these special characters: @ # $ ! % ^ * ? ` &
required.loginPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters long. Please enter a valid password.
